untranslatable_reason: TRIX (Triple Exponential Moving Average) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The closest available proxy is MACD with its signal line, which follows the same crossover logic pattern, but TRIX is a distinct momentum indicator. To properly implement this signal, TRIX and its signal line would need to be added to the available indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires TRIX indicator which is not in the allowed list. Substituted MACD/MACD_signal as a functionally similar momentum crossover system, but this is NOT equivalent to the original TRIX-based signal. Original signal uses 9-day TRIX period with author-silent signal line (typically EMA of TRIX).
